_meta.summary: Sixth tuning iteration. Coloured shield mechanic is reworked from an HP pool into a binary modifier: while a shield is up, only the matching main weapon (blue=pulse, red=spread, yellow=vulcan) can damage the enemy inside; wrong-weapon bullets collide with the shield CIRCLE and ricochet. Correct-weapon bullets pass through the shield untouched and damage the enemy hitbox normally. Boss shields cycle on/off — S seconds shielded (random colour each cycle), N seconds naked, repeating, where S/(S+N) ramps linearly from 0.5 at boss 1 to 1.0 at boss 10 (boss 10 is always shielded with colour rotating every 10s). Boss fire intervals are doubled — every fire pattern now triggers half as often, giving the player time to read the shield colour and swap shoulders. Regular shielded enemies (20%-50% spawn rate) keep their shield permanently and must be killed with the right weapon or escape.
diff_from_previous: ENEMY_SHIELD_HP constant removed — shield is binary, no HP pool.
BOSS_SHIELD_RESPAWN_DELAY constant removed — replaced by per-boss S/N cycle.
Added BOSS_SHIELD_CYCLE_TOTAL = 10.0 and _boss_shield_cycle(boss_n) returning (S, N) for boss number 1..10. S/(S+N) = 0.5 + 0.5 * (n - 1) / 9.

Enemy.shield_hp / shield_max / shield_flash_t fields removed. Enemy.shield_radius added — set when a shield is equipped, used by both collision (circle distance test) and draw (halo ring) for visual/logical agreement.
_apply_enemy_shield(e, color=None) now just sets shield_color + shield_radius (max(rect.w,rect.h)//2 + 2). No HP fields.
_draw_enemy_shield simplified — constant SHIELD_THICKNESS = 6 px halo, slow shimmer, per-enemy phase offset to avoid lockstep. Drops the HP-ratio-based thickness scaling.
Enemy.shoot_rect (broad-phase rect for friendly-bullet vs enemy collision) inflates to the shield circle's bounding box when shielded, drops to the regular hit_rect when naked.

Bullet-vs-enemy collision refactor: when enemy is shielded, the broad-phase rect match enters a REFINE step — right-weapon bullets check enemy.hit_rect (rect overlap = damage); wrong-weapon bullets check circle distance to shield_radius (inside = ricochet for mains, absorb for sides). Sides + untyped friendly bullets bouncing off the shield are silently consumed; only player mains turn hostile on ricochet.
Boss.__init__ takes a `boss_n` parameter (1..10); computes _shield_S, _shield_N via _boss_shield_cycle, starts shielded with a random colour, _shield_phase_timer = S.

Boss.update runs the shield cycle: when timer hits 0, alternate phases (naked → shielded with new random colour, or shielded → naked). If N=0 (boss 10) the naked phase is skipped in a single loop iteration so the shield never visually drops; only the colour rotates.
Boss fire pattern intervals doubled: was [1.2, 0.9, 0.6] seconds per phase, now [2.4, 1.8, 1.2]. Same fan/ring/aimed patterns; just half the cadence.
Boss.draw HUD strip shows a shield-PHASE pip (coloured strip whose width drains over the remaining phase time; muted-grey while naked) instead of the old shield-HP strip.
spawn_boss + the test-scaffold boss-spawner both pass boss_n = sector + 1 when constructing the Boss.
_meta.next_snapshot: Bump to 08-<short-slug>.json after the next gameplay change.
top_level_levers: BOSS_SHIELD_CYCLE_TOTAL (S + N seconds per cycle, currently 10s)
Boss fire pattern intervals (currently [2.4, 1.8, 1.2] seconds per phase 0/1/2)
ENEMY_SHIELD_COLORS / SHIELD_COLOR_TO_KIND (which weapon counters which colour)
SHIELD_THICKNESS (visual + collision halo thickness, currently 6 px)
All snapshot-06 levers carried forward (player shield/engine/main weapons, level scaling, sector composition, tier-unlock cascade).

_schema.purpose: Self-contained baseline of every numeric lever that affects gameplay difficulty and feel.

conventions.fire_rate_sec: seconds between shots (lower = faster). Reciprocal is shots/sec.
conventions.damage_per_bullet: raw damage applied per projectile hit; player i-frames apply between hits.
conventions.speed_px_per_sec: scalar OR [min, max] when randomized at spawn.
conventions._notes: free-form comment field. Ignore for diffing semantics.

enemy_shields._design: Binary modifier — shield up = only matching main weapon damages, others bounce off the shield circle. No HP, no chip. Player MUST swap to kill (regular) or wait/swap to land damage (boss cycle).

spawn_rate_regular_enemies._notes: Unchanged from snapshot 06 — regular enemies still roll a fixed-on shield at this rate.

enemy_shields.regular_enemy_shield_persistence: permanent — kill with correct weapon or let the enemy escape the screen

boss_cycle._design: S seconds shielded with random colour, N seconds naked. S/(S+N) is the duty cycle.
boss_cycle.boss_starts: shielded with random colour — player sees the colour during the descent intro and can pre-hold the right shoulder
boss_cycle.n_zero_handling: naked phase of length 0 is skipped in a single update tick — shield never visually drops, only the colour rotates

interactions.right_main_weapon: bullet passes through shield untouched. Damage registers if the bullet's rect overlaps the enemy's hit_rect (refine step after broad-phase shoot_rect match).
interactions.wrong_main_weapon: bullet collides with shield CIRCLE (refine step: dist^2 < (shield_radius + shield_thickness)^2). Ricochet via v' = v - 2(v·n)n; bullet becomes hostile so it can hurt the player on return.
interactions.missile_or_drone: absorbed silently by the shield circle (no damage, no ricochet).
interactions.screen_clear_ability: bypasses — applies e.hp -= 400 directly, doesn't go through bullet collision.
interactions.mega_laser_ability: bypasses — applies e.hit(dmg) directly each frame.
interactions.enemy_contact_damage: shields do NOT block body contact; the player loses HP normally on a shielded enemy ramming them.

boss_fire_rate._design: Halved from snapshot 06 so the cadence matches the shield-cycle rhythm and gives the player time to read the shield colour + swap shoulders.
boss_fire_rate._notes: Phase escalation unchanged: phase 0 at full HP, phase 1 below 66%, phase 2 below 33%.

carry_forward: Every lever in 06-shields-holdswap.json is unchanged: player shield HP/regen, engine speeds, enemy HP/score/credits, fire rates (except boss), level scaling, sector composition, tier-unlock cascade, upgrade costs, ability cooldowns, main-weapon hold-swap mechanic, pickup behaviour. See 06-shields-holdswap.json for the full baseline.
